name: Long Request Workload
description: Complex LLM calls that take more than 5 seconds

requests.prompt: Explain the complete architecture of modern operating systems including kernel, memory management, process scheduling, and I/O management.
Compare and contrast supervised learning, unsupervised learning, and reinforcement learning with detailed examples for each.
Describe the history of artificial intelligence from the 1950s to present day, including key milestones and breakthrough technologies.
Explain microservices architecture in detail, including service discovery, load balancing, API gateway, and inter-service communication patterns.
Provide a comprehensive comparison of SQL and NoSQL databases, covering data models, consistency models, and use cases.
Explain blockchain technology, including distributed ledgers, consensus algorithms, smart contracts, and cryptographic foundations.
Describe the complete process of training a large language model, from data collection and preprocessing to fine-tuning and deployment.
Compare cloud computing service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS) with examples and typical use cases for each.
Explain containerization and orchestration technologies like Docker and Kubernetes in detail.
Provide a comprehensive overview of cybersecurity threats, vulnerabilities, and defense strategies for modern web applications.
